assignments.value:
={{ $('Extract from File').item.json.data
    .replace('posted_date:', 'posted_date: ' + $('Date & Time').item.json.currentDate)
    .replace('status: ready', 'status: published')
    .replace('X: false', 'X: true')
    .replace('Mastodon: false', 'Mastodon: true')
    .replace('Bluesky: false', 'Bluesky: true')
    .replace('Threads: false', 'Threads: true')
    .replace('Instagram: false', 'Instagram: true')
    .replace('Facebook: false', 'Facebook: true')
}}
